page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1ne.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores utilizing the x86_64 architecture, specifically the Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a base clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core memory-to-vCPU ratio. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core processing, as measured by stress-ng and Geekbench, falls into the bottom 25%, with single-threaded gzip compression performing in the bottom 10%. However, multi-core performance scales to average levels, with Passmark CPU, Geekbench multi-core, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression all registering in the middle 50% tier. Memory bandwidth tests for both cached small blocks and uncached large blocks also demonstrate average throughput.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.se1ne.8xlarge offers a high-density memory profile relative to its compute resources, making it a viable option for workloads requiring substantial memory footprints without demanding top-tier single-thread CPU performance. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent multi-core execution, though the lack of local NVMe storage and GPUs limits its utility for high-I/O databases or accelerated machine learning training. This instance is best suited for memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory caching with Redis, medium-scale database operations, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1ne.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores running at 2.5 GHz and 256.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor with an x86_64 architecture, this instance provides an 8.0 GB per core memory allocation but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Benchmark data reveals weak single-core performance, balanced by average multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities. The instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-dense workloads that do not require high single-threaded processing power. It is well-suited for in-memory databases, caching layers, and general enterprise applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1ne.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 256 GB RAM. It delivers average multi-core performance for in-memory databases and caching.

tagline: A memory-dense virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and balanced multi-core performance for enterprise caching and database workloads.

256.0 GB of RAM providing an 8.0 GB per core ratio
